items.title: REDBEAN - Senior Backend/AI Developer - Saigon/Remote - FT
items.description:
As a Senior AI/Backend Engineer at Redbean, you will build the core infrastructure for our AI-powered entertainment and social network products. Redbean was founded by former engineers from Amazon, TikTok, and Quora, and is the third Vietnamese startup to receive investment from Y Combinator, the accelerator that helped launch companies like Airbnb, Reddit, Stripe, etc.

Redbean is developing innovative mobile apps in the AI, social, and gaming space for a global audience. This is a unique opportunity for engineers who want to explore the latest AI advancements and apply them to real-world products. We value independent thinking, relentless curiosity, and a passion for building great user experiences. If you want to build great products at the forefront of technology and challenge yourself in a dynamic startup environment, join us.

## Location

* Hybrid for candidates located in Saigon, Remote for candidates in Hanoi

## Salary Expectation

* $2,500-$4,000/month, plus stock options

## Requirements
* Strong curiosity about the world, AI advancements, and user behavior; ability to think independently (we seek proactive problem-solvers, not task-takers).
* Product and user-centric mindset; ability to learn quickly and be resourceful; problem-solving skills.
* High sense of responsibility and ownership.
* 3+ years of experience in backend development.
* Proven experience in designing, developing, and deploying scalable backend systems and APIs.
* Proficiency in system design principles and best practices.
* Knowledge of common software design patterns and data structures.
* Bonus: Solid understanding and practical experience with AI concepts; direct experience with or a strong desire to work with generative AI (e.g., LLMs, prompt engineering, fine-tuning, RAG), AI agents, and vector databases is a significant plus.

## Skills

* Backend Frameworks: Experience with relevant backend frameworks (e.g., Django, Flask, FastAPI for Python; Spring Boot for Java; Express.js for Node.js, etc.).
* API Design: Expertise in designing and implementing RESTful APIs and/or GraphQL.
* Cloud Platforms & DevOps: Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure) and containerization technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes). Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines.
* System Architecture: Ability to design scalable, reliable, and maintainable distributed systems.
* Bonus: Experience with LLM APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Cohere, Anthropic) and techniques like prompt engineering, RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation), and fine-tuning. Understanding of AI agent frameworks and concepts.

## Responsibilities

* Design, build, and maintain robust, scalable, and high-performance backend systems and APIs to power AI-driven features in our mobile applications.
* Integrate and deploy Large Language Models (LLMs) and other generative AI technologies to create novel user experiences.
* Actively research, prototype, and implement cutting-edge AI advancements, particularly in generative AI and AI agents, to drive product innovation and solve complex user problems.
* Collaborate closely with product, design, and other engineering team members to define technical requirements, design robust AI solutions, and deliver high-quality features.
* Optimize backend systems, data pipelines, and AI models for performance, scalability, latency, stability, and maintainability.
* Establish and champion best practices for backend development, data processing, and AI integration within the engineering team.

## Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Directly apply the latest in generative AI, LLMs, and AI agent technologies to build innovative global products.
* Influence product and AI strategy in an environment that values independent thinking and real ownership.
* Collaborate with and learn from a high-caliber, YC-backed team (ex-Amazon, TikTok, Quora) in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.
* Be a core part of a passionate team creating next-generation social and gaming experiences for users worldwide.

## Projects

* Develop a ground-breaking AI social/gaming mobile app with us

## Contact

**Submit your CV/resume at long@tinai.com**
Homepage: https://redbean.ai
Email: long@tinai.com

items.title: [Remoto] Igma | Designer UX/UI SГӘnior
items.description:
**O que buscamos**
Estamos em busca de uma pessoa Designer UX/UI Senior para criar experiГӘncias digitais impactantes, desde a concepГ§ГЈo atГ© a execuГ§ГЈo. Essa pessoa serГЎ responsГЎvel por traduzir as necessidades dos usuГЎrios e os requisitos de negГіcios em ideias de produto, materializando-as em interfaces intuitivas e funcionais. Procuramos alguГ©m com ampla experiГӘncia em design de produtos digitais, habilidade em prototipagem rГЎpida e disposiГ§ГЈo para liderar sessГөes imersivas de co-criaГ§ГЈo.
Unimos design e tecnologia para transformar problemas complexos em soluГ§Гөes digitais que revolucionam o relacionamento entre empresas e consumidores.

**Modelo de trabalho**
- Regime: 100% remoto
- Modelo de contrataГ§ГЈo: PJ

**Requisitos essenciais (nГӯvel senior)**
- ProficiГӘncia em ferramentas de design, como Figma, Sketch ou Adobe XD
- ExperiГӘncia em design de interface (UI) e experiГӘncia do usuГЎrio (UX)
- Habilidade em prototipagem rГЎpida e realizaГ§ГЈo de testes de usabilidade
- Conhecimento em design responsivo e prГЎticas de acessibilidade
- Capacidade de criar e manter design systems
- ExperiГӘncia em criar wireframes, mockups e protГіtipos interativos

**Conhecimentos desejГЎveis**
- Criatividade e inovaГ§ГЈo para propor soluГ§Гөes Гәnicas
- Conhecimento bГЎsico de HTML, CSS e prГЎticas de front-end (diferencial)
- Boa comunicaГ§ГЈo para defender e justificar escolhas de design

**Responsabilidades e premissas para a posiГ§ГЈo**
Na Igma, o Designer UX/UI Senior serГЎ responsГЎvel por desenvolver soluГ§Гөes visuais e interativas que sejam inovadoras e eficazes para o usuГЎrio. Гү essencial que tenha aptidГЈo para trabalhar em equipe com profissionais de diferentes ГЎreas, saiba se comunicar com clareza e tenha adaptabilidade para lidar com mudanГ§as constantes. Para isso, Г© necessГЎrio fazer parte de sua rotina:
- Traduzir dados e feedbacks dos usuГЎrios em soluГ§Гөes de design centrado no usuГЎrio (Design Thinking)
- Colaborar com equipes multidisciplinares em sessГөes de co-criaГ§ГЈo imersivas
- Criar e defender decisГөes de design em apresentaГ§Гөes para stakeholders
- Realizar prototipagem rГЎpida e testes de usabilidade com usuГЎrios
- Garantir consistГӘncia e escalabilidade por meio de design systems
- Aplicar prГЎticas de acessibilidade e responsividade nas interfaces

**Premissas culturais**
- Coragem para realizar o que acredita
- ExcelГӘncia na busca constante por superaГ§ГЈo
- DisposiГ§ГЈo genuГӯna para se conectar com pessoas, sejam colegas, clientes ou parceiros
- TransparГӘncia para trabalhar em um ambiente de confianГ§a
- Energia para realizar

**Etapas do processo**
- Cadastro
- Entrevista inicial
- Entrevista Fit Cultural
- Entrevista TГ©cnica
- Proposta
- ContrataГ§ГЈo

**BenefГӯcios**
вңҢпёҸ Trabalho 100% remoto
рҹ’ҷ Plano de SaГәde individual
рҹ§ҳ AuxГӯlio Cuidado e Desenvolvimento
рҹҸғ Incentivo Г  prГЎtica de esportes
рҹ’і CartГЈo multi-benefГӯcio atravГ©s do Caju
рҹ’» AuxГӯlio Remoto para investimento em equipamentos (R$ 2.000 anuais)
рҹҸ–пёҸ PJ - 30 dias de fГ©rias remuneradas

Como se candidatar
Candidate-se no [link](https://jobs.quickin.io/igma/jobs/6827a1231bc74900137ba651)

items.title: [Remoto] Igma | UX/UI Designer SГӘnior
items.description:
Estamos procurando uma pessoa UX&UI Designer SГӘnior para se juntar ao nosso time de Growth fortalecendo o chapter de Design para criarmos produtos digitais para as maiores empresas do Brasil. Buscamos uma pessoa com vivГӘncia em projetos complexos, pensamento estratГ©gico e excelГӘncia na execuГ§ГЈo.
Unimos tecnologia e design para resolver problemas complexos de empresas. Criamos produtos digitais que revolucionam o relacionamento entre empresas e consumidores.

**Modelo de trabalho**
- Regime: 100% remoto
- Modelo de contrataГ§ГЈo: PJ
- Escopo de trabalho: AlocaГ§ГЈo no cliente

**Requisitos essenciais (nГӯvel SГӘnior)**
- Conduzir investigaГ§Гөes e processos de descoberta com autonomia, em parceria com clientes e tecnologia
- Traduzir contextos e problemas complexos em jornadas, fluxos e experiГӘncias simples e elegantes
- Liderar dinГўmicas de ideaГ§ГЈo, alinhamentos com stakeholders e processos de priorizaГ§ГЈo de hipГіteses
- Criar e prototipar interfaces com excelГӘncia visual e funcional, garantindo aderГӘncia as decisГөes jГЎ estabelecidas
- Estabelecer boas prГЎticas e rotinas de colaboraГ§ГЈo com desenvolvedores para garantir alta qualidade na entrega
- Avaliar e propor melhorias contГӯnuas com base em dados, pesquisas e indicadores de usabilidade
- Ter domГӯnio dos padrГөes e especificidades de interaГ§ГЈo Web e Mobile
- Atuar como referГӘncia tГ©cnica e estratГ©gica para outros designers e stakeholders

**Ferramentas que utilizamos, mas nГЈo limitam nosso trabalho**
- Figma
- Framer
- Maze
- Google Firebase / Analytics / Data Studio
- Hotjar

**Responsabilidades e premissas para a posiГ§ГЈo**
Na Igma, Designers desempenham um papel fundamental na definiГ§ГЈo da estratГ©gia dos produtos que construГӯmos junto a nossos clientes. Como UX/UI Designer SГӘnior, vocГӘ:
- LiderarГЎ, com o apoio dos Heads, o pilar de design no time de Growth, garantindo o desenvolvimento e escala de produtos valiosos, simples e impactantes
- SerГЎ responsГЎvel por fortalecer a parceria com os clientes, compreendendo o negГіcio em profundidade e desdobrando a visГЈo do produto em experiГӘncias digitais inspiradoras
- AtuarГЎ de forma estratГ©gica no roadmap e nas decisГөes de evoluГ§ГЈo do produto, com base em mГ©tricas, aprendizados de pesquisa e visГЈo de longo prazo
- FomentarГЎ a cultura de design centrado em pessoas, promovendo boas prГЎticas e contribuindo ativamente com o crescimento do time
- Гү essencial ter fluidez na colaboraГ§ГЈo com diferentes perfis, boa comunicaГ§ГЈo e jogo de cintura para lidar com contextos ambГӯguos ou em constante mudanГ§a.

**Premissas culturais**
- Coragem para realizar o que acredita
- ExcelГӘncia na busca constante por superaГ§ГЈo
- DisposiГ§ГЈo genuГӯna para se conectar com pessoas, sejam colegas, clientes ou parceiros
- TransparГӘncia para trabalhar em um ambiente de confianГ§a
- Energia para realizar

**Etapas do processo**
- Cadastro
- Entrevista inicial
- Fit Cultural
- Entrevista tГ©cnica
- Proposta
- ContrataГ§ГЈo

**BenefГӯcios**
вңҢпёҸ Trabalho 100% remoto
рҹ’ҷ Plano de SaГәde individual
рҹ§ҳ AuxГӯlio Cuidado e Desenvolvimento
рҹҸғ Incentivo Г  prГЎtica de esportes
рҹ’і CartГЈo multi-benefГӯcio atravГ©s do Caju
рҹ’» AuxГӯlio Remoto para investimento em equipamentos (R$ 2.000 anuais)

items.title: REMOTE WORKING - Backend Developer (Go/ Python)
items.description:
**Singapore-based | Data Intelligence Product | Fully Remote**

Join a fast-growing Singapore-based data intelligence company that helps businesses build meaningful customer relationships in the AI-driven world. Our secure and scalable platform empowers leading brandsвҖ”from banks to e-commerceвҖ”to deliver personalized experiences, all while upholding privacy and data security.
We are a remote-first company with a globally distributed team of 60+ professionals across Southeast Asia, Australia, New Zealand, Europe, and the Middle East.
We are looking for a Medior Backend Engineer to join our remote engineering team and contribute to the development of our core product.

**What You'll Do**

- Design, develop, and maintain the server-side components of a modern data intelligence platform.
- Tackle challenges around performance, scalability, observability, and multi-cloud infrastructure.
- Collaborate on architectural decisions, infrastructure improvements, and AI feature integrations.
- Build prototypes, optimize production code, and contribute to improving legacy systems.

**What We're Looking For**
_Technical Skills:_

- Proven experience building production-level backend systems (Python and Go are a plus, but any language is welcome).
- Familiarity with SOLID principles and test-driven development.
- Solid command of English communication in a remote team environment.

_Mindset & Culture Fit:_

- Versatile вҖ“ from quick prototypes to scalable systems.
- Proactive вҖ“ comfortable identifying and fixing tech debt.
- Collaborative вҖ“ values genuine team bonding, both online and offline.
- Curious вҖ“ always learning and experimenting with new technologies.

_Some Challenges You May Tackle_

- Handling billions of customer events across databases.
- Improving performance and optimizing APIs.
- Migrating to Kubernetes and managing multi-cloud environments (GCP, AWS, Azure).
- Enhancing monitoring and alerting systems.
- Implementing AI & LLM integrations for intelligent automation.

**Your Role, Your Way**
We donвҖҷt box people into rigid job descriptions. Whether your passion lies in backend systems, DevOps, or AI, you can shape your role based on your strengths and our evolving needs.

**Contact:** Zalo 0941496526 - HГ  NhЖ°

items.title: [Remoto] Igma | Product Designer Pleno
items.description:
Estamos em busca de uma pessoa Product Designer Pleno para se juntar ao nosso Chapter de Design e fortalecer nosso time de pessoas alocadas em uma das maiores instituiГ§Гөes de saГәde da AmГ©rica Latina.

- Regime: 100% remoto

**Ferramentas que utilizamos, mas nГЈo delimitam nosso trabalho**

- LiderarГЎ, com o apoio dos Heads, o pilar de design de produto em uma squad, garantindo a criaГ§ГЈo de produtos valiosos para pessoas com o mais alto nГӯvel de qualidade, desde a concepГ§ГЈo atГ© seu crescimento apГіs ganhar o mundo.
- SerГЎ responsГЎvel por fortalecer a parceria com PO, assimilar as premissas de negГіcio e desdobrar a visГЈo estratГ©gica do produto para criar produtos digitais inspiradores, de qualidade e elegГўncia visando tanto a experiГӘncia do usuГЎrio, quanto os resultados para o negГіcio.
- AcompanharГЎ o desenvolvimento, farГЎ anГЎlises das mГ©tricas de utilizaГ§ГЈo e usabilidade do produto e tomarГЎ decisГөes junto ao seu time sobre prГіximos passos e visГЈo de futuro do produto.
- Гү essencial que tenha aptidГЈo para trabalhar em equipe com profissionais de diferentes ГЎreas, saiba se comunicar com clareza e tenha adaptabilidade para lidar com mudanГ§as constantes.

**Premissas culturais**
- Coragem para realizar o que acredita
- ExcelГӘncia na busca constante por superaГ§ГЈo
- DisposiГ§ГЈo genuГӯna para se conectar com pessoas, sejam colegas, clientes ou parceiros
- TransparГӘncia para trabalhar em um ambiente de confianГ§a

**Etapas do processo**

- Entrevista inicial
- Fit Cultural
- Entrevista tГ©cnica
- Entrevista no cliente
- Proposta
- ContrataГ§ГЈo

**Requisitos**
- Participar do processo de investigaГ§ГЈo e ideaГ§ГЈo desde o inГӯcio, junto ao time de EstratГ©gia e de Tecnologia
- Ser capaz de traduzir problemas complexos em experiГӘncias simples

items.title: [Remoto] Igma | Product Designer SГӘnior
items.description:
Estamos procurando uma pessoa Product Designer SГӘnior para se juntar ao nosso time de Produto e fortalecer o chapter de Design.
Buscamos uma pessoa com vivГӘncia em projetos complexos, pensamento estratГ©gico e excelГӘncia na execuГ§ГЈo. VocГӘ atuarГЎ alocado(a) em uma das maiores construtoras da AmГ©rica Latina, colaborando com um time multidisciplinar para criar soluГ§Гөes digitais com alto impacto.
Unimos tecnologia e design para resolver problemas complexos de empresas. Criamos produtos digitais que revolucionam o relacionamento entre empresas e consumidores.

**Modelo de trabalho**
- Regime: 100% remoto
- Modelo de contrataГ§ГЈo: PJ
- Escopo de trabalho: AlocaГ§ГЈo no cliente

**Ferramentas que utilizamos, mas nГЈo limitam nosso trabalho**
- Figma
- Framer
- Maze
- Google Firebase / Analytics / Data Studio
- Hotjar

**Responsabilidades e premissas para a posiГ§ГЈo**
Na Igma, Product Designers desempenham um papel fundamental na definiГ§ГЈo da estratГ©gia dos produtos que construГӯmos junto a nossos clientes. Como Product Designer SГӘnior, vocГӘ:
- LiderarГЎ, com o apoio dos Heads, o pilar de design de produto em uma squad, garantindo a criaГ§ГЈo de produtos valiosos, simples e impactante desde a concepГ§ГЈo atГ© sua evoluГ§ГЈo em escala
- SerГЎ responsГЎvel por fortalecer a parceria com o PO, compreender o negГіcio em profundidade e desdobrar a visГЈo do produto em experiГӘncias digitais inspiradoras
- AtuarГЎ de forma estratГ©gica no roadmap e nas decisГөes de evoluГ§ГЈo do produto, com base em mГ©tricas, aprendizados de pesquisa e visГЈo de longo prazo
- FomentarГЎ a cultura de design centrado em pessoas, promovendo boas prГЎticas e contribuindo ativamente com o crescimento do time
- Гү essencial ter fluidez na colaboraГ§ГЈo com diferentes perfis, boa comunicaГ§ГЈo e jogo de cintura para lidar com contextos ambГӯguos ou em constante mudanГ§a.

**Requisitos**
- Conduzir investigaГ§Гөes e processos de descoberta com autonomia, em parceria com Produto e Tecnologia
- Traduzir contextos e problemas complexos em jornadas, fluxos e experiГӘncias simples e elegantes
- Liderar dinГўmicas de ideaГ§ГЈo, alinhamentos com stakeholders e processos de priorizaГ§ГЈo de hipГіteses
- Criar interfaces com excelГӘncia visual e funcional, garantindo aderГӘncia ao design system e evoluГ§ГЈo constante
- Estabelecer boas prГЎticas e rotinas de colaboraГ§ГЈo com desenvolvedores para garantir alta qualidade na entrega
- Avaliar e propor melhorias contГӯnuas com base em dados, pesquisas e indicadores de usabilidade
- Ter domГӯnio dos padrГөes e especificidades de interaГ§ГЈo Web e Mobile
- Atuar como referГӘncia tГ©cnica e estratГ©gica para outros designers e stakeholders

**Premissas culturais**
- Coragem para realizar o que acredita
- ExcelГӘncia na busca constante por superaГ§ГЈo
- DisposiГ§ГЈo genuГӯna para se conectar com pessoas, sejam colegas, clientes ou parceiros

- Energia para realizar

items.title: [SГЈo Paulo] - Senior Data Engineer [AB-Inbev]
items.description:
## DescriГ§ГЈo da vaga

**About the role**

We're seeking a highly skilled and passionate Data Engineer to join our expanding Data Intelligence Platform team. In this pivotal role, you'll be instrumental in architecting, building, and optimizing our data pipelines and overall data architecture. You'll also be crucial in ensuring seamless data flow and collection for various cross-functional teams.

As an ideal candidate, you possess a strong background in constructing robust data pipelines and are adept at data wrangling. You thrive on optimizing data systems and have a knack for building solutions from the ground up. We are a "code-first" Data Engineering team, meaning we develop reusable solutions through code. If you're fueled by a passion for both code and data, this is the perfect environment for you to excel.

You should be a self-starter, comfortable navigating the data requirements of diverse teams, systems, and products. The opportunity to optimize and even re-envision our company's data architecture to support our next wave of products and data-driven initiatives should excite you.

**What you'll do:**
- Design, build, and maintain scalable and efficient data pipelines.
- Optimize existing data pipelines and data flow for performance and reliability.
- Develop and implement data collection strategies across various sources.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand their data needs and deliver solutions.
- Build data transformations, data structures, metadata, dependency, and workload management.
- Implement and enforce data quality and data governance processes.
- Identify, design, and implement internal process improvements: automating manual processes, optimizing data delivery, re-designing infrastructure for greater scalability, etc.  
- Troubleshoot and resolve data-related issues.
- Stay up-to-date with the latest data engineering technologies and best practices.
- Contribute to the design and evolution of our data warehouse and data lake architecture.

## Local

On-site - Campinas/SP

## BenefГӯcios

- Performance based bonus*
- Attendance Bonus* 
- Private pension plan
- Meal Allowance
- Casual office and dress code
- Days off*
- Health, dental, and life insurance
- Medicines discounts
- WellHub partnership
- Childcare subsidies
- Discounts on Ambev products*
- Clube Ben partnership
- Scholarship*
- School materials assurance
- Language and training platforms
- Transport allowance

*Rules applied

## Requisitos

- Proven experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar role.
- Strong proficiency in programming languages relevant to data engineering (Python/pyspark).
- Experience with Databricks.
- Experience with data warehousing solutions (e.g., Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery).
- Experience with ETL/ELT tools and frameworks.
- Solid understanding of database technologies (both SQL and NoSQL).
- Experience with cloud platforms and their data services (AWS, Azure).
- Familiarity with data pipeline and workflow management tools (Apache Airflow, Databricks Workflow).
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
- Strong communication and collaboration abilities.
- A proactive and self-directed approach to work.
- A passion for building and optimizing data systems.

**If you're a highly motivated Data Engineer who loves to code and shape data infrastructure, we encourage you to apply and become a key contributor to our Data Intelligence Platform!**

## ContrataГ§ГЈo

CLT

## Nossa empresa

**About us**

AB InBev is the leading global brewer and one of the worldвҖҷs top 5 consumer product companies. With over 500 beer brands, weвҖҷre number one or two in many of the worldвҖҷs top beer markets, including North America, Latin America, Europe, Asia, and Africa.

**About AB InBev Growth Group**

Created in 2022, the Growth Group unifies our business-to-business (B2B), direct-to-consumer (DTC), Sales & Distribution, and Marketing teams. By bringing together global tech and commercial functions, the Growth Group allows us to fully leverage data and drive digital transformation and organic growth for AB InBev around the world.

In addition to supporting well known global beer brands like Corona, Budweiser and Michelob Ultra, the Growth Group is home to a robust suite of digital products including our B2B digital commerce platform BEES, on-demand delivery services Ze Delivery and TaDa Delivery, and table top beer keg PerfectDraft.

We are an exceptional team, focused on understanding and supporting consumer and customer needs, harnessing new technology, and scaling growth opportunities.

## Como se candidatar

Application here: https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/abinbev/jobs/7959352002

#### AlocaГ§ГЈo

On-site

#### Regime
- CLT

#### NГӯvel
- SГӘnior

items.title: REMOTE FULLTIME - SENIOR CLOUD ENGINEER - ATTRACTIVE SALARY + BENEFITS
items.description:
**Work Arrangement:** Fully Remote
**Compensation:** Negotiable + 13th-month fixed salary
**Note:** This is a full-time roleвҖ”no side jobs.

Are you passionate about building robust, scalable, and secure cloud infrastructure?
Do you enjoy solving tough challenges and working with cutting-edge technologies? Our client is seeking a Senior Cloud Engineer to join their team and play a key role in evolving their Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS) offering.

If you're a proactive engineer with deep cloud expertise and a love for mentoring and collaboration, this could be the perfect next step for you!

****рҹ”§ What You'll Be Doing****

- Design, build, and monitor cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure platforms.
- Deploy and manage both open-source tools and proprietary cloud-based applications.
- Handle troubleshooting for customer-facing systems, ensuring high availability and performance.
- Architect and maintain secure and resilient systems across cloud environments.
- Contribute to the overall design of the PaaS architecture.
- Support knowledge-sharing and growth by mentoring fellow engineers.
- Participate in a rotating on-call schedule to handle incidents and ensure minimal downtime.

**вң… What You Bring**

- Strong experience managing Kubernetes clusters with a focus on high availability and deep troubleshooting.
- Hands-on with Helm, including chart creation and maintenance.
- Proficiency in AWS or Azure, especially around secure and scalable infrastructure design.
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines to automate deployments and streamline workflows.
- Familiarity with monitoring tools like Prometheus and GrafanaвҖ”you know how to set up meaningful dashboards and alerts.
- Solid grasp of Infrastructure as Code (especially Terraform).

_**рҹҢҹ Bonus Skills**_

- Experience with both AWS and Azure environments.
- Familiar with GitLab CI and building out pipelines.
- Understanding of cloud and Kubernetes networking: Private Link, VPC/VNet Peering, CNI, Ingress, service mesh, etc.
- Hands-on with ArgoCD and GitOps workflows.
- Strong experience with PostgreSQL administration.

**рҹҺҒ Benefits & Perks**

- Full salary during probation
- 13th-month guaranteed salary
- 15 days of paid annual leave
- Premium health insurance
- Language course access
- Conference tickets (top industry events)
- Learning platforms like Udemy
- Fun company events: themed New Year parties, summer gatherings, and more

**рҹ§© Hiring Process**
Round 1: Screening with Recruiter
Round 2: Technical Interview with the EU team
Round 3: (Optional) Final chat with EU team members
_All interviews will be conducted online._

Contact: hanhunguyen1999@gmail.com / Zalo/Tele: 0941496526

## DescriГ§ГЈo da vaga:
Estamos buscando um Desenvolvedor .NET/Angular para cliente internacional. Modelo de contrataГ§ГЈo: CLT. HorГЎrio: 08h Г s 17h. InglГӘs: AvanГ§ado B2 obrigatГіrio.


## Atividades e responsabilidade:
рҹҡҖ Desenvolvimento de aplicaГ§Гөes em microserviГ§os utilizando .NET.
рҹҡҖ Criar CГіdigo Limpo, framework .NET, seguindo mГ©todos de construГ§ГЈo de aplicaГ§Гөes e APIs utilizando boas prГЎticas (ex. Clean Code).

рҹӣ  ExperiГӘncia com desenvolvimento backend .NET e frontend Angular.
рҹӣ  ExperiГӘncia com bases de dados nГЈo relacional (MongoDB, Redis).
рҹӣ  ExperiГӘncia com linguagem SQL (SQLServer, PostgreSQL).
рҹӣ  SГіlidos conhecimentos em CI/CD, DDD, Service Bus, Testes UnitГЎrios, Micro frontend, Gitflow, EDD e Azure DevOps.


## BenefГӯcios:

items.title: (Remoto) Data Analyst Senior
items.description:
## DescriГ§ГЈo da vaga

Estamos buscando um(a) Engenheiro(a) de AnГЎlise SГӘnior altamente qualificado(a) com experiГӘncia avanГ§ada em modelagem de dados e ferramentas de visualizaГ§ГЈo. O(a) profissional ideal terГЎ experiГӘncia comprovada trabalhando com estruturas de dados mГ©dias a complexas em um ambiente corporativo. Ele(a) deve ser proficiente em trabalhar com dados no Snowflake, transformando dados de vГЎrias fontes com DBT e visualizando-os eficientemente no Power BI para consumo do cliente. AlГ©m disso, valorizamos um(a) profissional disposto(a) a compartilhar suas habilidades e conhecimentos com outros membros da equipe.

Responsabilidades Principais:

Colaborar efetivamente em equipes virtuais, contribuindo com ideias e soluГ§Гөes inovadoras de forma proativa.
Autogerenciar a carga de trabalho, priorizando tarefas de forma eficiente e cumprindo prazos.
Dedicar parte do tempo ao compartilhamento de conhecimento e orientaГ§ГЈo de membros juniores da equipe, por meio de sessГөes de pareamento e mentorias.

Habilidades e ExperiГӘncia NecessГЎrias:

Modelagem de Dados AvanГ§ada: Ampla experiГӘncia em projetar e implementar modelos de dados complexos, com forte compreensГЈo de normalizaГ§ГЈo, desnormalizaГ§ГЈo e design de esquema.
Processos ETL: ProficiГӘncia no desenvolvimento e otimizaГ§ГЈo de processos ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) utilizando ferramentas como DBT (Data Build Tool).
Data Warehousing: Conhecimento profundo dos conceitos e melhores prГЎticas de data warehousing, especialmente com Snowflake.
VisualizaГ§ГЈo de Dados: Habilidades avanГ§adas na criaГ§ГЈo de painГ©is e relatГіrios interativos e informativos utilizando Power BI.
Linguagens de ProgramaГ§ГЈo: ProficiГӘncia em SQL e experiГӘncia com pelo menos uma linguagem de programaГ§ГЈo como Python ou R para manipulaГ§ГЈo e anГЎlise de dados.
Plataformas de Nuvem: ExperiГӘncia com plataformas de nuvem como AWS, Azure ou Google Cloud, especialmente em relaГ§ГЈo ao armazenamento e processamento de dados.
Ajuste de Desempenho: Capacidade de otimizar o desempenho do banco de dados, incluindo ajuste de consultas e estratГ©gias de indexaГ§ГЈo.
GovernanГ§a de Dados: CompreensГЈo dos princГӯpios de governanГ§a de dados, incluindo qualidade de dados, linhagem de dados e seguranГ§a de dados.

QualificaГ§Гөes DesejГЎveis:

IA e Aprendizado de MГЎquina: ExperiГӘncia com modelos de IA e aprendizado de mГЎquina, incluindo a capacidade de trabalhar com conjuntos de dados relacionados.
Gerenciamento de Projetos: ExperiГӘncia em gerenciamento de projetos de dados, incluindo planejamento, execuГ§ГЈo e entrega.
CertificaГ§Гөes: CertificaГ§Гөes relevantes, como Snowflake SnowPro Core Certification, Microsoft Certified: Data Analyst Associate ou similar.


## Local

Remoto 

## ContrataГ§ГЈo

- PJ ou CLT


## Como se candidatar

Entrar em contato com a recrutadora atravГ©s do linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mariajuliaricosti/


## Labels

#### AlocaГ§ГЈo
- Remoto


#### Regime
- CLT
- PJ

#### NГӯvel
- SГӘnior
- Especialista

items.title: [Dikshatek] - [Senior NodeJs Engineer] - [Remote/HCM] - [Fulltime]
items.description:
## Location 

* Remote 100% - prefer located in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

## Salary Expectation

* Min 50,000,000 VND Gross (Negotiable depending on experience)

## About The Job

* Our client is a US-based Nextgen digital health platform company. They develop unique new AI/ML powered products for connecting patients and providers that empower users to take control of their health records and overall wellness. 
* They are well funded through our investment partners to enable us to scale product services in the US and then move globally into chosen target markets.  


## Requirements 

### Must Have 

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or a closely related field.
* Minimum of 7 years of professional experience in software development.
* Strong prior experience with NodeJS frameworks and REST APIs is essential.
* Hands-on experience working with Kafka, Redis, and Logstash.
* Advanced knowledge of SQL (PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Elasticsearch).
* Understanding of data modeling and relational databases.
* Proficient in debugging, troubleshooting, and problem-solving.
* Experience with ReactJS/NextJS and Prompt Engineering is a significant plus.
* Experience in the healthcare industry is preferred.
* A strong desire to learn, grow, and embrace responsibility and accountability in a highly autonomous environment.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
* Experience in a startup working environment is a plus.


### Nice To Have
* Experience with Google, AWS, cloud-based development, experience working with Docker Containers, Kubernetes


## YouвҖҷll Be Responsible For

* As part of the Software Engineering team, you will have various opportunities and responsibilities to:
* Cover gathering requirements to design, coding, testing, deploying, and maintain our software
* Develop the microservices system with high requirements for performance, scalability, and security
* Collaborate with product, frontend and QA team to deliver high quality product


## Why It Would Be Awesome To Work With Us 

* Fulltime remote working
* Annual leaves
* Full SHUI
* ESOP
* Annually bonus

## Interview Process:
* Round 1 (Optional): Quick call with HRD from client side
* Round 2: Take-home test on Hacker Earth
* Round 3: Online technical interview with global development team
* Round 4 (Optional): Interview with CEO (30вҖҷ)
_The interviews usually take place at 7:00 PM_


## Contact 
Kindly contact me for further details about the job
